response.original_title: How hard is it to cancel a Norton subscription? 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468
response.overview: Canceling a Norton subscription is widely considered very difficult, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 largely because Norton employs aggressive auto-renewal settings that are enabled by default, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 and the online cancellation button is often hidden, grayed out, or missing entirely from account pages, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 many users report spending 20 to 40 minutes searching through menus like "Billing," "Subscriptions," and "Service Settings" just to find the cancellation option, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 and even when found, clicking "Turn Off Auto-Renewal" sometimes does not fully cancel the subscription, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 forcing customers to call Norton support directly at 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 to complete the process, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 once on the phone, users face long hold times, automated menus, and multiple transfers between departments, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 with some customers reporting waits of over an hour before reaching a live agent, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 when an agent finally answers,
response.title: How hard is it to cancel a Norton subscription? 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468
